framework.name: NIS2 French Transposition - Cybersecurity Requirements
framework.name_nl: Transposition francaise de NIS2 - Exigences de cybersecurite
framework.scope: French implementation of EU Directive 2022/2555 (NIS2) covering essential and important entities
framework.structure_description: Requirements for entity registration, risk management measures, incident reporting, supply chain security, governance obligations, and ANSSI supervision.

controls.title: Entity registration with ANSSI
controls.title_nl: Enregistrement de l'entite aupres de l'ANSSI
controls.description: Essential and important entities shall register with ANSSI, declaring their activities, sectors, and point of contact.
controls.description_nl: Les entites essentielles et importantes doivent s'enregistrer aupres de l'ANSSI, declarant leurs activites, secteurs et point de contact.

controls.title: Management body accountability
controls.description: Management bodies of essential entities shall approve cybersecurity risk measures and be trained in cybersecurity.
controls.description_nl: Les organes de direction des entites essentielles doivent approuver les mesures de gestion des risques cyber et etre formes en cybersecurite.

controls.title: Risk analysis and security policy
controls.title_nl: Analyse des risques et politique de securite
controls.description: Entities shall conduct regular risk analysis and maintain security policies covering their information systems.
controls.description_nl: Les entites doivent conduire des analyses de risques regulieres et maintenir des politiques de securite couvrant leurs systemes d'information.

controls.title: Incident handling procedures
controls.description: Implement documented incident handling procedures including detection, analysis, containment, and recovery.
controls.description_nl: Mettre en oeuvre des procedures de gestion des incidents documentees incluant la detection, l'analyse, le confinement et la recuperation.

controls.title: Business continuity and crisis management
controls.title_nl: Continuite d'activite et gestion de crise
controls.description: Maintain business continuity plans, disaster recovery procedures, and crisis management capabilities.
controls.description_nl: Maintenir des plans de continuite d'activite, des procedures de reprise apres sinistre et des capacites de gestion de crise.

controls.title: Supply chain security
controls.description: Assess and manage cybersecurity risks in the supply chain, including security requirements for suppliers and service providers.
controls.description_nl: Evaluer et gerer les risques de cybersecurite dans la chaine d'approvisionnement, incluant des exigences de securite pour les fournisseurs et prestataires.

controls.title: Vulnerability management
controls.description: Implement vulnerability handling and disclosure processes, including patch management and coordinated vulnerability disclosure.
controls.description_nl: Mettre en oeuvre des processus de gestion et divulgation des vulnerabilites, incluant la gestion des correctifs et la divulgation coordonnee.

controls.title: Security hygiene practices and training
controls.description: Implement basic cyber hygiene practices and provide regular cybersecurity training to all personnel.
controls.description_nl: Mettre en oeuvre les pratiques de base d'hygiene cyber et fournir une formation reguliere en cybersecurite a tout le personnel.

controls.title: Cryptographic controls
controls.description: Implement appropriate use of cryptography, including encryption policies aligned with ANSSI recommendations.
controls.description_nl: Mettre en oeuvre une utilisation appropriee de la cryptographie, incluant des politiques de chiffrement alignees sur les recommandations de l'ANSSI.

controls.title: Access control and asset management
controls.title_nl: Controle d'acces et gestion des actifs
controls.description: Implement access control policies and maintain a complete asset inventory including human resources security.
controls.description_nl: Mettre en oeuvre des politiques de controle d'acces et maintenir un inventaire complet des actifs incluant la securite des ressources humaines.

controls.title: MFA and secure authentication
controls.description: Deploy multi-factor authentication, continuous authentication, or equivalent measures for system access.
controls.description_nl: Deployer l'authentification multifacteur, l'authentification continue, ou des mesures equivalentes pour l'acces aux systemes.

controls.title: Secure communications
controls.description: Use secured voice, video, and text communications and emergency communication systems.
controls.description_nl: Utiliser des communications voix, video et texte securisees et des systemes de communication d'urgence.

controls.title: Early warning notification (24h)
controls.description: Notify ANSSI within 24 hours of becoming aware of a significant incident (early warning with initial assessment).
controls.description_nl: Notifier l'ANSSI dans les 24 heures suivant la connaissance d'un incident significatif (alerte precoce avec evaluation initiale).

controls.title: Incident notification (72h)
controls.description: Submit a detailed incident notification to ANSSI within 72 hours including severity assessment, impact, and indicators of compromise.
controls.description_nl: Soumettre une notification d'incident detaillee a l'ANSSI dans les 72 heures incluant l'evaluation de severite, l'impact et les indicateurs de compromission.

controls.title: Final incident report (1 month)
controls.description: Submit a final incident report within one month including root cause analysis, mitigation applied, and cross-border impact.
controls.description_nl: Soumettre un rapport d'incident final dans un delai d'un mois incluant l'analyse des causes profondes, les mesures d'attenuation et l'impact transfrontalier.

controls.title: ANSSI supervision compliance
controls.description: Entities shall cooperate with ANSSI inspections, audits, and requests for information on their cybersecurity posture.
controls.description_nl: Les entites doivent cooperer avec les inspections, audits et demandes d'information de l'ANSSI sur leur posture de cybersecurite.

controls.title: Penalty awareness for non-compliance
controls.title_nl: Conscience des sanctions en cas de non-conformite
controls.description: Essential entities face administrative fines up to 10M EUR or 2% of global turnover; important entities up to 7M EUR or 1.4%.
controls.description_nl: Les entites essentielles encourent des amendes administratives jusqu'a 10M EUR ou 2% du CA mondial ; les entites importantes jusqu'a 7M EUR ou 1,4%.
